headline: Strategic angle — None; expansion is fossil-based and does not unlock green financing
what_matters: BRSR mandatory disclosure triggered; GRI/TCFD/ESRS relevance for future reporting cycles; no immediate penalty but increased scrutiny.
ESG score gap may widen versus peers like JSW Energy if fossil fuel dependency increases and disclosure lags.
No immediate talent or consumer impact; local community concerns may rise if pollution increases.
action: Strategic opportunity: None; expansion is fossil-based and does not unlock green financing
Competitive position: Potential ESG score gap vs JSW Energy, which is diversifying into renewables
